description: Perform a probabilistic customer base analysis using the 'Buy 'Til You Die' (BTYD) framework in R using the 'cdnowSummary' dataset. Fit a BG/NBD model to estimate the parameters (r, alpha, a, b) and save them to /home/ga/RProjects/output/model_params.txt. Create a calibration plot comparing actual versus model-predicted transaction frequencies and save it to /home/ga/RProjects/output/frequency_plot.png. Calculate the 'Conditional Expected Transactions' for the next 52 weeks and the 'Probability of being Alive' (P(Alive)) for all customers. Export the results to /home/ga/RProjects/output/customer_predictions.csv including columns for 'id', 'frequency', 'recency', 'expected_transactions_52w', and 'p_alive', sorted by expected transactions in descending order. Write the analysis code in /home/ga/RProjects/clv_analysis.R.
